---
name: Adaptation note
about: Share how you've forked or adapted the framework
title: "[adaptation] "
labels: adaptation
assignees: cntrout
---

## What you built on top

Brief description of how you forked or extended the framework for your own use.

## What worked well

Aspects of the framework that translated cleanly to your context.

## What you had to change

The pieces that didn't fit your situation and needed adaptation. Specifics help.

## What might be useful upstream (optional)

If you think a change or pattern would benefit the canonical framework, describe it here. No PR expected; I'll evaluate and may incorporate.

## Link to your fork (optional)

If your fork is public and you're willing to share, drop the URL.
